code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{Box,Container,LinearProgress,Typography}from"@mui/material";import Navbar from"../components/Navbar";import CarGrid from"../components/CarGrid";import ReservationDialog from"../components/ReservationDialog";import{fetchCars}from"../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function CarsPage(){const[cars,setCars]=useState([]);const[selectedCar,setSelectedCar]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState("");useEffect(()=>{fetchCars().then(data=>setCars(Array.isArray(data)?data:[])).catch(()=>setError("Failed to load cars")).finally(()=>setLoading(false));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Container,{sx:{py:6},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{sx:{mb:2},children:"Loading cars..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LinearProgress,{})]}),!loading&&error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Container,{sx:{py:6},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{color:"error",children:error})}),!loading&&!error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CarGrid,{cars:cars,onReserve:car=>setSelectedCar(car)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ReservationDialog,{open:!!selectedCar,car:selectedCar,onClose:()=>setSelectedCar(null)})]});}
